prompt: A high-impact shonen manga anime illustration of a powerful white-haired sorcerer in a dramatic low-angle full-body pose, laughing with his head thrown back and mouth wide open, wearing a sleek black high-collar uniform and a black blindfold over his eyes. His left hand is thrust toward the viewer making a two-finger peace sign, with strong foreshortening that makes the hand large in the foreground, while his right arm hangs lower at his side. Surround him with explosive {argument name="energy color" default="electric blue"} supernatural energy, violent brushstroke-like aura trails, flying debris, sparks, and swirling curved streaks cutting across the frame. The background should be a dark, abstract, chaotic energy burst with glowing blue shards and motion lines, creating a sense of overwhelming power. Use bold cel-shaded anime rendering with painterly highlights, sharp linework, intense contrast, and glossy fabric folds on the black outfit. On the right side, add 1 large jagged white manga speech bubble with thick black outline containing the text {argument name="speech bubble text" default="LUDDITES ALWAYS LOSE!"} in huge distressed black uppercase letters. Vertical composition, dynamic action poster framing, confident triumphant attitude, modern dark fantasy anime aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 一张极具冲击力的少年漫画风格插画，描绘了一位强大的白发术士，他正以极具戏剧性的低角度全身姿势仰头大笑，嘴巴张开，身穿黑色高领制服，双眼蒙着黑色眼罩。他的左手向观众伸出，做出剪刀手姿势，通过强烈的透视效果使手部在前景中显得格外巨大，右手则自然下垂。周围环绕着爆炸性的 {argument name="energy color" default="电光蓝"} 超自然能量，伴有狂野的笔触式光晕轨迹、飞溅的碎片、火花以及横跨画面的弯曲流光。背景为深色抽象的混沌能量爆发，点缀着发光的蓝色碎片和动态线条，营造出一种压倒性的力量感。采用大胆的赛璐珞动漫渲染风格，结合绘画感的高光、锐利的线条、强烈的对比以及黑色服装上富有光泽的褶皱。在画面右侧，添加 1 个带有粗黑色轮廓的巨大锯齿状白色漫画对话气泡，其中包含 {argument name="speech bubble text" default="卢德分子必败无疑！"} 字样，使用巨大的做旧黑色大写字母。竖构图，动态动作海报构图，自信且胜利的姿态，现代暗黑奇幻动漫美学。

breakdown.creativeCore: 蒙眼术士胜利姿势：此提示词可生成一张极具戏剧性的竖版动漫动作海报，画面中是一位佩戴眼罩的白发术士，伴随着爆发性的蓝色能量和醒目的漫画对话气泡，非常适合用于风格化角色艺术或粉丝向视觉创作。
breakdown.subject: 服饰
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:

Composition:
[参考构图: full-body, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, manga, fantasy]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
